Help and contact

Support

Paper Flock production release · v1.2

Loading the public support contact…

Report a problem

  1. Describe what you were doing when the problem appeared.
  2. Include the device, browser, and Paper Flock version.
  3. Do not send passwords or unrelated personal information.
  4. Email the public support address shown above.

Protect progress

Before clearing browser data, changing devices, or moving to another domain, open Settings → Data and export a progress backup.

Installation help

On Android, use the browser's Install app option when available. On iPhone or iPad, open Paper Flock in Safari and use Share → Add to Home Screen.
